headline: Sil Swinkels
body: Aston Villa can confirm that Sil Swinkels has completed a permanent transfer to Sheffield Wednesday. The Dutch defender had been at Villa since 2020 when he signed from Feyenoord and would win the FA Youth Cup in his first season at the club. Following a spell on loan with Bristol Rovers, he spent last term with Exeter City and Chesterfield, helping the latter reach the League Two play-offs.
raw_text:
Aston Villa can confirm that Sil Swinkels has completed a permanent transfer to Sheffield Wednesday.

The Dutch defender had been at Villa since 2020 when he signed from Feyenoord and would win the FA Youth Cup in his first season at the club.

Following a spell on loan with Bristol Rovers, he spent last term with Exeter City and Chesterfield, helping the latter reach the League Two play-offs.
text:

The Dutch defender had been at Villa since 2020 when he signed from Feyenoord and would win the FA Youth Cup in his first season at the club.

Following a spell on loan with Bristol Rovers, he spent last term with Exeter City and Chesterfield, helping the latter reach the League Two play-offs.
